fields.name: Assassin
fields.description: You have been trained in the deadly arts of assassination. Whether through a guild, a mentor, or bitter necessity, you have learned to strike from the shadows and vanish without a trace. This training has honed your predatory instincts and your talent for deception.

fields.name: Highborn
fields.description: You are a claimant to a noble title in one of the realms beyond Arx. Whether through birth, marriage, or political maneuvering, you hold a landed title and the responsibilities that come with it. This grants you some measure of wealth and social standing, and marks you as someone of the blood -- eligible for certain traditions that train only nobility.

fields.name: Leal Agent
fields.description: You are a sworn operative of a noble house, embedded in the criminal underworld to serve your patrons from the shadows. Whether by choice or obligation, you live a double life -- moving among thieves and cutthroats while secretly answering to a landed lord. Your noble handlers ensured you received training befitting someone in their service.
